pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.x to 3.x, which is required for Java 21 support and introduces breaking API changes.
Upgrade Hibernate from 5.x to 6.x to align with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21 requirements.
Upgrade Tomcat to version 10.1.x to support Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces required by Spring Boot 3.
Upgrade SLF4J to 2.x to match the logging API changes in Spring Boot 3 and Java 21 ecosystem.
Remove Spring Boot OAuth dependency as it is deprecated/removed in Spring Boot 3.
Remove Spring Boot Social dependency as it is deprecated/removed in Spring Boot 3.
